segments.text: And it came to pass, that on one of those days, as he taught the people in the temple, and preached the gospel, the chief priests and the scribes came upon him with the elders
Tell us, by what authority doest thou these things? or who is he that gave thee this authority?
segments.speaker: Chief Priests and Scribes

segments.text: And he answered and said unto them
If we shall say, From heaven; he will say, Why then believed ye him not?
segments.speaker: Chief Priests and Scribes

segments.text: But and if we say, Of men; all the people will stone us: for they be persuaded that John was a prophet.
segments.speaker: Chief Priests and Scribes

segments.text: And they answered, that they could not tell whence it was
And Jesus said unto them
Then began he to speak to the people this parable
God forbid.
segments.speaker: People

segments.text: And he beheld them, and said
And the chief priests and the scribes the same hour sought to lay hands on him; and they feared the people: for they perceived that he had spoken this parable against them
And they watched him, and sent forth spies, which should feign themselves just men, that they might take hold of his words, that so they might deliver him unto the power and authority of the governor
Master, we know that thou sayest and teachest rightly, neither acceptest thou the person of any, but teachest the way of God truly
segments.speaker: Spies

segments.text: Is it lawful for us to give tribute unto Cæsar, or no?
segments.speaker: Spies

segments.text: But he perceived their craftiness, and said unto them
Cæsar's.
segments.speaker: Spies

segments.text: And he said unto them
And they could not take hold of his words before the people: and they marvelled at his answer, and held their peace
Then came to him certain of the Sadducees, which deny that there is any resurrection; and they asked him
Master, Moses wrote unto us, If any man's brother die, having a wife, and he die without children, that his brother should take his wife, and raise up seed unto his brother
segments.speaker: Sadducees

segments.text: There were therefore seven brethren: and the first took a wife, and died without children
And the second took her to wife, and he died childless
And the third took her; and in like manner the seven also: and they left no children, and died
Last of all the woman died also
Therefore in the resurrection whose wife of them is she? for seven had her to wife
segments.speaker: Sadducees

segments.text: And Jesus answering said unto them
Master, thou hast well said
segments.speaker: Scribes

segments.text: And after that they durst not ask him any question at all
And he said unto them
Then in the audience of all the people he said unto his disciples
